en.name: Level 16 — Altered Topography
en.shortDescription: A level whose terrain rapidly transforms between ecosystems, currently a frozen arctic of luminous ice and unpredictable topography.
en.atmosphere: Hazardous and unstable: an arctic landscape that reshapes without warning, threatening sudden geological and environmental shifts.
en.tips: Never linger during an environmental shift. The exit moves with each transformation — don't get boxed in by changing terrain.
